## Summary
- fail closed when `pass1a_character_ledger_v1` is empty or internally inconsistent with V2 identity projection
- block Review Gate when `ledger_quality_report_v1` is blocked or repair-required
- block accepted-ledger creation when quality or Pass 3A semantics are unsafe
- add regression coverage for the exact Chapter 3 empty-ledger / polluted-V2 fixture

## What this patch fixes
Bad Story Ledger artifacts cannot advance, render as author-facing review, or be auto-accepted when upstream semantics are invalid.

## What this patch does not prove
It does not yet prove the generator can produce a clean positive Story Ledger for the 4,412-word chapter. That remains the next validation step.

## Tests
- `npx jest --runInBand __tests__/lib/evaluation/phase1a/failClosedStoryLedgerConsistency.test.ts __tests__/evaluation/reviewGate.phaseV2Handoff.test.ts __tests__/evaluation/storyLedgerApprovalNormalizer.test.ts`
- `npx jest --runInBand __tests__/lib/evaluation/processor.test.ts`
